summary: Audience recording that is boomy on the first set but clearer on the second, offering the best available source despite modest sound quality.
review: The tape captures an audience mix with a noticeably boomy first set, while the second set sounds a bit cleaner. Reviewers consider it the best source currently available, though the overall audio fidelity is only fair and the performance itself isn’t highlighted beyond the slight improvement in the latter half.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review; it notes both positives (best source, better second set) and negatives (boomy first set), leading to an average overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: First set sounds boomy; second set is a little clearer. Overall the mix is acceptable but not high‑fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set perceived as sounding better than the first, though no specific performance details are given.
